name: Tiny Tiger, Natural Indoor Recipe Chicken Flavor Dry Cat Food
description: Fuel your indoor cat’s most fantastic feats—and support their whole-cat health from ears to tail—with Tiny Tiger! Flourishing felines everywhere agree, good food is key to staying in tip-top shape, and what’s in the bottom of their bowl can take them to the top of the charts. That’s where this complete and delicious chicken flavor comes in. It’s not only tasty—and boy, is it tasty—but it’s specifically crafted for overall kitty nutrition, with all 25 essential vitamins and minerals to meet a kitty’s needs, plus taurine for healthy eye support and omegas for skin and coat health. It’s also formulated to help maintain an indoor cat’s healthy weight and has added fiber blends specifically to support an indoor cat’s healthy digestive system. Plus, this recipe is crafted with no artificial colors, flavors or preservatives so you can feel good about every scoop your kitty devours.
